text: This section presents an overview of all the bodies that make up our society. Each body plays a distinct role, contributing to effective governance, collaboration, and decision-making. Together, they ensure transparency, shared responsibility, and the smooth functioning of our society. The Joint EUFEPS / SITELF Meeting 2026 will take place from May 27 - 29, in Naples, Italy.

Andre R Peters will give a talk with the title: " Strategies to reduce unregulated antimicrobial usage in African livestock; the role of One Health and public-private partnerships". Second International Conference under the patronage of EUFEPS.

11th Balaton - Bled- Baltic - Bosporus (BBBB) Meeting 11th BBBB meeting will be held from 24 - 26 September, 2026 in Siófok, Hungary The EuPAT 13 Meeting 2026 will take place from September 28 - 30, in Ghent, Belgium. EUFEPS is delighted to welcome back the APS-GB as a member organisation. Best wishes for a pleasant Easter period and a refreshing spring season!.
